news.t: With Intelligence Honors Thornburg with Two 2026 Mutual Fund & ETF Awards
Thornburg Expands Active ETF Lineup with Two Fixed Income ETFs

overview.description: The Thornburg Core Plus Bond ETF (TPLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns through investments in the broad US fixed-income market. Securities can be of any credit quality and maturity. TPLS was launched on Feb 5, 2025 and is issued by Thornburg.
